The events of the film are dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] according to ''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|The Essential Chronology]], giving a birth date of [[49 BBY/Legends|47 BBY]].</ref>

'''Deel Surool''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]<ref name="Theed" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="CoreRulebook" /> [[Scoundrel/Legends|scoundrel]] who was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].<ref name="Theed" /> He was born around [[49 BBY/Legends|49 BBY]]<ref name="Age" /> to parents who were wealthy [[Merchant/Legends|merchants]]. Surool's parents set up a trading emporium in the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], where he attended the [[Royal House of Learning/Legends|Royal House of Learning]]. At the house, Surool befriended several teenagers, including the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Sia-Lan Wezz]], and the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Force]] volunteer [[Galak]].<ref name="Theed" />

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he played a minor role as a member of the [[Naboo Underground]] in defending the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces.

{{Char-stub}}
